acceptance_targets: [ch05_f003] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, 199, and 419, no more than two paragraphs use the current smell-led list construction and at least one is recast through a different sensory frame; FAIL if all three retain the same smell-list template.

[ch05_f004] PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:191-196, at least two of the three entries begin with different syntactic openings and one contains a human-voice fragment or immediate focalized reaction; FAIL if all three remain protocol-header clones.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, 199, and 419, no more than two paragraphs use the current smell-led list construction and at least one is recast through a different sensory frame; FAIL if all three retain the same smell-list template.
findings.problem: A recurring atmospheric formula (location + smelled/smelling + odor list) appears three times, creating a detectable prose tic and flattening texture variety.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least one of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:199, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:419 to shift sensory channel (sound, touch, spatial pressure) and sentence shape, while preserving setting continuity.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:191-196, at least two of the three entries begin with different syntactic openings and one contains a human-voice fragment or immediate focalized reaction; FAIL if all three remain protocol-header clones.
findings.problem: Three consecutive case entries use near-identical header syntax (route cluster + payload marker + victim record), which reads as mechanical report output and reduces tonal modulation at a critical emotional hinge.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the run at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:191-196 so only one entry keeps full protocol formatting; vary the other two through distinct syntax (for example, one filtered through Ina's immediate bodily reaction and one through witness-note voice) while retaining key factual data.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when stakes demand it: show coercion mechanics, sexual negotiation, grief rituals, and financial desperation at scene level. In edge cases, prefer precision over decorum; protect character dignity through perspective accuracy, not by omitting the hard material.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene requires bodily, economic, or moral consequence and the draft retreats into abstract phrasing, rewrite with concrete action, sensation, and decision impact before proceeding.
aesthetic_risk_policy.operational_resolution_rule: When uncertain between tasteful distance and narrative truth, choose the version that preserves causal accountability and embodied consequence, then tune language for clarity rather than softness.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for deliberate emphasis, legal language, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter structures deliberately: high-density dialogue vs interior reflection, multi-scene public collision vs two-scene intimate pressure, aftermath inventory vs anticipatory dread. Never let two consecutive chapters share the same pacing architecture or turn mechanism.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsentimental literary diction that permits technical vocabulary, profanity, and class-marked speech without flattening idiolects.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person centered on Seo Ina, with brief controlled widenings in public-event chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternating pressure waves: compressed clauses in operational stress, longer breath-based lines in grief and reflection.
